title: [AI5] Develop Custom Pi Extension

summary: Pi Extension development framework verified. Pi Coding Agent v0.74.1 is the custom extension, fully integrated with TNF. Agent definition at .claude/agents/pi-coding-agent.md with multi-provider support (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Codex, Jules). Config at ~/.pi/agent/. TNF skills bridged via symlinks.
